name: game-designer
description: Phaser H5 game frontend, Go backend scaffolding, TypeScript SDK, and PaaS deployment skills for Codex

interface.shortDescription: H5 game frontend and backend scaffolding, SDK integration, and deployment
interface.longDescription: Game Designer helps code agents create browser-playable Phaser H5 games, connect them to a Go backend template, TypeScript SDK, and deploy via CLI.
